classification_rationale: Video contains instructional overlays with text cues ('Make your incision', 'Remove the mass', 'Close') and demonstrates technique step-by-step in a teaching format with pauses and visual guidance. This is not a timed performance by a trainee, but rather a tutorial showing proper technique execution.

frame_analyses.description: Foam appendage model visible suspended between two transparent clamps on white surface with laparoscopic instruments positioned above
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Standard FLS Endoloop setup with target appendage clearly visible

frame_analyses.description: Two grasping instruments positioned above appendage, ready for manipulation
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Appropriate instrument positioning for initial target approach

frame_analyses.description: Scissors/cutting instrument making initial incision into foam appendage tissue
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean cutting motion demonstrated; appendage being divided with controlled technique

frame_analyses.description: Red tissue mass visible being separated/removed from main appendage body
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrates division and removal of 'pathologic mass' portion

frame_analyses.description: Ligating loop visible above appendage stump, instruments positioned to deploy loop
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Pre-tied loop ready for deployment over remaining appendage

frame_analyses.description: Loop being advanced over appendage base with grasping instruments guiding placement
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Loop positioned at marked target line on appendage

frame_analyses.description: Loop being tightened around appendage base with gentle instrument manipulation
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Gradual cinching motion demonstrated; loop securing around vascular pedicle

frame_analyses.description: Loop fully cinched and secured at marked line; appendage stump visible below loop
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Loop appears to be at appropriate position on appendage

frame_analyses.description: Instruments withdrawing; ligated appendage secured with loop visible at closure point
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Task completion with successful loop ligation demonstrated

demonstrated_techniques: Proper foam appendage setup and positioning between clamps
Initial surgical approach and tissue incision
Division and removal of pathologic mass from appendage
Correct loop placement at marked target line on appendage base
Gentle cinching motion to secure loop without tissue damage
Final verification of loop position and appendage ligation
verbal_cues: Make your incision — indicates initial cutting phase
Remove the mass — directs focus to pathology removal
Close — indicates final loop deployment and closure
common_errors_addressed: Avoiding placement of loop too proximal or distal to marked line
Preventing appendage avulsion through controlled cinching tension
Ensuring loop is fully seated and secure before removing instruments
Maintaining proper tissue handling to avoid unnecessary trauma

scoring_note: This video is classified as instructional content with teaching overlays and step-by-step demonstrations. Per FLS scoring protocol, instructional videos are NOT scored as trainee performances. The analysis above extracts teaching content only. No FLS performance score is computed.
scoring_rationale: Video contains explicit instructional text overlays ('Make your incision', 'Remove the mass', 'Close') and demonstrates idealized technique sequentially without time pressure or actual trainee performance context. Classification as instructional rather than performance precludes standard scoring methodology.
